extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER POEL attacked with 500m to go on second ascent of Mûr-de-Bretagne, took stage win plus 18 seconds from both climb bonuses to claim yellow jersey.
tactical_patterns: INEOS explicitly targeting stage bonuses to deny ROGLIC time rather than pure GC defense per Cummings pre-race.
VAN DER POEL attacked final 500m after QUINTANA's premature move at 1km exhausted chasers, perfect counter-timing tactical pattern.
ALAPHILIPPE trapped mid-pack on final ascent despite yellow jersey, team failed positioning on narrow approach to decisive climb.
PORTE burned matches pulling too early for INEOS on final climb, left THOMAS isolated when decisive accelerations came.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: hunted both Mûr-de-Bretagne ascents for bonus seconds systematically, showed GC ambition beyond expected one-day role
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: lost 20+ seconds to podium rivals on Cat 3 finish, significantly weaker explosive power than expected GC form
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: attacked 1km out but mistimed effort, inadvertently set up VAN DER POEL's winning move by stringing out group
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: yellow jersey failed to position for final climb defense, surprising tactical breakdown for home roads specialist
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: marked every dangerous move including VAN DER POEL acceleration, grabbed second place bonus while ROGLIC got nothing
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: pulled too long too early for INEOS, tactical error left protected riders exposed when race exploded
